zh.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables於1330年出生。她和Thomas de Davenport至少有1個女兒。她去世於1417年享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables于1330年出生。她和Thomas de Davenport至少有1个女儿。她去世于1417年享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Margeret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables was born in 1330. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas de Davenport. She died in 1417, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables est née en 1330. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas de Davenport. Elle est décédée en 1417, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables wurde 1330 geboren. Sie hatte mit Thomas de Davenport mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 87 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables è nata il nel 1330. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas de Davenport. Morì nel 1417, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeret Venablesは1330年に生まれた。彼女はThomas de Davenportとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1417年に87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables(은)는 1330년 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas de Davenport(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables nasceu em 1330. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Thomas de Davenport. Ela faleceu em 1417, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables родилась в 1330 г. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas de Davenport. Она умерла в 1417 г. в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margeret Venables nació en 1330. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Thomas de Davenport. Murió en 1417, a la edad de 87 años.
